attributes.description: TrendAI Vision One Detection Events Overview.

params.markdown:
This dashboard provides an overview of the detection logs collected by the TrendAI Vision One integration.

The dashboard highlights detection trends over time. It features tables showing the top malware, rule names, and action results, as well as pie charts that break down detections by protocol. Additionally, it includes a bar chart showing the breakdown of detections by event action and blocking reason.

[**Integration Page**](/app/integrations/detail/trend_micro_vision_one/overview)

embeddableConfig.title: Distribution of Detection by Blocking Reason
